overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia ascending stone stairs in the Beauclair Palace gardens. The character walks through an ornate Gothic gazebo with valley views and continues up through crowds of NPCs in a sunlit Mediterranean-style palace setting with lush vegetation.

events.description: passes armored NPC guard descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide stone stairs toward the palace spire visible above

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red descending the staircase

entered.detail: wide weathered stone staircase ascending the hillside
ornate stone railing with Gothic arched openings overlooking the sea
tall pointed spire of the palace rising above the trees
decorative stone bridge connecting upper palace wings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt ascending a grand stone staircase in the palace gardens. The path is flanked by an ornate stone balustrade on the right offering sea views, while palace architecture looms ahead. An armored guard descends the stairs, passing the player character around the 4-second mark.

events.description: approaching the ornate Gothic gazebo structure at the top of the stairs
entering the covered gazebo with stone columns

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stairs past colorful flower beds toward the elaborate stone gazebo

entered.detail: lush pink and magenta flowering shrubs lining the stairway
elaborate stone gazebo with pointed Gothic arches and decorative columns

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending through a garden terrace lined with vibrant pink flowering bushes. The ornate Gothic gazebo becomes the focal point ahead, growing larger as the character approaches. The stone balustrade continues along the right side with views of the sea beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: gazebo viewing platform overlooking the valley

events.description: pauses at the overlook to view the valley, then turns around to continue

agents.ego_description: walking through the gazebo to the overlook, pausing briefly to view the valley landscape before turning

entered.detail: stone angel statues with wings flanking the gazebo entrance
panoramic view of green valley with lakes and distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shaded interior of the Gothic gazebo, passing between stone columns and angel statues. The space opens to a breathtaking valley overlook with views of distant mountains and lakes. After a brief pause at the railing, the character turns to continue the ascent.

events.description: passes group of NPCs in elegant dress descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the second set of stairs through crowds of elegantly dressed NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in green and yellow dress descending the stairs
group of nobles in formal attire walking down the stairway

entered.detail: massive spreading tree with dense canopy providing shade over the stairs
ornate palace facades with arched windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gazebo area, the character ascends a second grand staircase now populated with NPCs in colorful medieval attire. An ancient tree dominates the center of the approach, while the palace wings become more prominent on the left. The crowd flows downward as the character moves up through the social gathering.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace courtyard approach with red-roofed buildings

events.description: approaching the red-roofed palace buildings and final stairway

agents.ego_description: continuing up the final stretch of path toward the palace entrance, passing a child running by

notable_agents.action: child in red dress running across the cobblestone path

entered.detail: palace building with distinctive red tiled roof and arched windows
flower boxes with pink blooms on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the palace proper, with distinctive red-roofed buildings now prominent on the left. The ground transitions to cobblestone as the character passes window boxes with flowers and continues toward the palace gate. The density of NPCs decreases as the character nears the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from the open palace gardens through a scenic overlook and into the bustling heart of a Mediterranean-style estate. It begins with Geralt climbing a grand stone staircase flanked by a balustrade with sea views, passing an armored guard as the path leads toward a garden terrace lined with vibrant pink flowering bushes. The camera then follows him into the shaded interior of an ornate Gothic gazebo, where stone columns and angel statues frame a breathtaking valley overlook of distant mountains and lakes. As he exits the gazebo, the scene shifts to a second grand staircase dominated by an ancient tree and populated by crowds of NPCs in colorful medieval attire. Finally, the path transitions to cobblestone as the character moves past red-roofed buildings and flower-filled window boxes toward the palace gate.
